title: Bring up LilyGO display and input hardware
description: Why this exists: LilyGO is expected to be the first visual/user-facing reference board, but display and input vary widely by model. What needs to be done: validate display controller, bus, backlight, orientation, resolution, buttons/encoder/keyboard/touch if present, debounce/input events, and low-power display behavior. Coordinate with project-LICHEN-rjsw for the actual device UI. Acceptance criteria: display test pattern or status screen renders correctly; input events are visible through Zephyr input/HAL; orientation/backlight are correct; UI-specific rendering work is linked to project-LICHEN-rjsw; missing drivers or hardware uncertainty create follow-up Beads.
notes: No-hardware loop block 2026-07-02: requires physical LilyGO/T-Deck hardware access for display/input, flashing, boot logs, packet/app smoke tests, or full bring-up acceptance. Software-only board/model/build slices are already split into completed or separate Beads; resume when a physical board and flashing/serial access are available.
